title: Bowlbug (Rock)

moves.title: Headbutt
effects: If Off Balance: stun self (triggers Dizzy next turn)

move_pattern: Starts with Headbutt. After each Headbutt, checks Off Balance: if Off Balance, the monster has stunned itself and uses Dizzy on the following turn to recover (clearing Off Balance), then returns to Headbutt. If not Off Balance, repeats Headbutt.
notes: Spawns with 1 stack of Imbalanced power. When Off Balance, Headbutt deals damage and then stuns the monster itself at the end of the attack — the monster shows a Stun intent the following turn (Dizzy move) and cannot act normally, then recovers by clearing Off Balance. The Imbalanced power controls when the Off Balance condition becomes active.
